title: FMGII: German Pack
description: Get your German weaponry with just only a click
body:
### FMGII: German Pack

![kluuo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d550101e9002616b6e7f59435c68de337a0221.png)

                This is an addon for **Fel's Machine Guns II** that adds and is designed to add German WWII guns to keep the main mod clean.

Featuring a **MG42** and a **MG34** with their respective crafting so far (More guns gonna be added).

![jkji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea9da46133eac1ee30118468c4354da2f21588cc.png)

 Requisites: **Fel's Machine Guns II** (base mod and its dependencies).
